case_title: PIERCE, CYNTHIA et al VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: PLFT'S REQUEST TO CORRECT THE JUDGMENT:DENIED BY COMM. NOTICED SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,800.00 FILED BY PIERCE, CYNTHIA PIERCE, CHRISTINE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLTF. TO BE SUBMITTED TO COMMISSIONER FOR REVIEW. COPY OF REQUEST MAILED TO DEFT.
PLAINTIFF CYNTHIA PIERCE DECLARATION, AMENDMENT TO PLAINTIFF CLAIM, FILED. RE: ADDING A SECOND PLAINTIFF TO THE CASE.
COPY OF REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFT CITY AND COUNTY RETURNED UNDELIVERED.
THIS CLAIM IS AGAINST A GOVERNMENT AGENCY.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PIERCE, CYNTHIA PIERCE, CHRISTINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
